channel.title: ciconia/awesome-music Weekly Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track your favorite github awesome repo, not just star it.

item.title: ciconia/awesome-music May 31st - Jun 6th, 2021
item.description:
Music Notation

  • OpenSheetMusicDisplaystars756 - Typescript library for rendering MusicXML in the browser.

item.title: ciconia/awesome-music May 17th - May 23rd, 2021
item.description:
Music Programming

  • py-modular - a modular and experimental programming environment with basic DSP routines in python.

item.title: ciconia/awesome-music Apr 12th - Apr 18th, 2021
item.description:
Music Theory Teaching

  • Theorytab - a database of songs with their chord functions.

item.title: ciconia/awesome-music Nov 2nd - Nov 8th, 2020
item.description:
Audio Libraries

  • Soundpipe - a lightweight DSP library written in C.

    • Music Programming

  • Sporth - a small stack based audio language.

    • Audio Tools

  • cyanripstars54 - rips and encodes standard audio CDs with the least effort required from user. Cross platform.

item.title: ciconia/awesome-music Sep 21st - Sep 27th, 2020
item.description:
Audio Tools

  • Ceciliastars122 - a CSound-based graphical environment for music and signal processing.

item.title: ciconia/awesome-music Feb 10th - Feb 16th, 2020
item.description:
Audio Tools

  • matcheringstars412 - сontainerized web application and library for automated reference audio mastering.

item.title: ciconia/awesome-music Jan 13th - Jan 19th, 2020
item.description:
Music Programming

  • Midicastars42 - MIDI programming language with decompiler and player, supports karaoke.

item.title: ciconia/awesome-music Dec 9th - Dec 15th, 2019
item.description:
Music Notation

  • Digital Music Standstars18 - a free web app for displaying sheet music.

item.title: ciconia/awesome-music Oct 21st - Oct 27th, 2019
item.description:
Music Notation

  • Abjad - a Python API for Formalized Score Control, based on Lilypond.

item.title: ciconia/awesome-music Sep 30th - Oct 6th, 2019
item.description:
Audio Tools

  • MusicBrainz - Open Encyclopedia for Music information and Metadata, providing a unique ID for everything
  • Beets - a powerful command-line music organizer and manipulator.

item.title: ciconia/awesome-music Feb 4th - Feb 10th, 2019
item.description:
Music Programming

  • Orcastars3.2k - live programming environment for music.

item.title: ciconia/awesome-music Nov 12th - Nov 18th, 2018
item.description:
Music Notation

  • Lilybin - an open source web-based LilyPond editor.

item.title: ciconia/awesome-music Oct 29th - Nov 4th, 2018
item.description:
Music Programming

  • Faust - a functional programming language specifically designed for real-time signal processing and synthesis.

item.title: ciconia/awesome-music Sep 24th - Sep 30th, 2018
item.description:
Music Theory Teaching

  • Artusi - Interactive music theory exercises.
  • musictheory.net - Lessons and exercises
  • OpenMusicTheory - a growing, online "textbook" for music theory and aural skills.

item.title: ciconia/awesome-music Sep 17th - Sep 23rd, 2018
item.description:
Audio Tools

  • fre:acstars547 - free audio converter. It supports audio CD ripping and tag editing.
  • Jackstars8 - command-line CD ripper.
  • K3bstars73 - is a full-featured CD/DVD/Blu-ray burning and ripping application.
  • lltagstars20 - automatic command-line mp3/ogg/flac file tagger and renamer.
  • Rubyripperstars85 - is a secure digital audio extraction application ("cd ripper") for Unix-like operating systems.
  • split2flacstars246 - split flac/ape/wv/wav + cue sheet into separate tracks
  • Whipperstars526 - Python CD-DA ripper preferring accuracy over speed.
  • X Audio Copystars3 - GTK and GNOME application for ripping CD-Audio and encoding in lossy and lossless audio formats.

    • Music Programming

  • Inscore - an environmnent for the design of interactive, augmented music scores.

    • Music Theory Teaching

  • Four Score and More - Tailored music theory exercises based on scores.

item.title: ciconia/awesome-music Feb 12th - Feb 18th, 2018
item.description:
Related lists

  • Awesome Audio Visualizationstars3.7k - A curated list about Audio Visualization.
  • Awesome Python for Scientific Audiostars1.1k - A curated list of python software and packages related to scientific research in audio.
  • Awesome WebAudiostars714 - A curated list of awesome WebAudio packages and resources.

    • Music Notation

  • Tbonstars11 - Typographic Beat-Oriented Notation for music.

item.title: ciconia/awesome-music Jan 15th - Jan 21st, 2018
item.description:
Related lists

  • Awesome Music Listeningstars63 - Awesome list of websites dedicated to listening to music.
  • Awesome sheet musicstars418 - A curated list of awesome sheet music software, libraries and resources.

item.title: ciconia/awesome-music Jan 1st - Jan 7th, 2018
item.description:
Music Notation

  • Hacklily - online LilyPond-based sheet music editor (with optional GitHub integration).

item.title: ciconia/awesome-music May 8th - May 14th, 2017
item.description:
Audio Libraries

  • Librosastars4.5k - a python package for music and audio analysis, providing the building blocks necessary to create music information retrieval systems.

item.title: ciconia/awesome-music Dec 26th - Jan 1st, 2016
item.description:
Music Notation

  • Lypstars64 - the Lilypond swiss army knife - easily install packages, manage multiple versions of Lilypond, and other tools for power users.

item.title: ciconia/awesome-music Sep 5th - Sep 11th, 2016
item.description:
Music Notation

  • i-score - a software for interactive music notation, with DAW features.

item.title: ciconia/awesome-music Aug 29th - Sep 4th, 2016
item.description:
Music Programming

  • OpenMusic - a visual programming language based on Lisp.

item.title: ciconia/awesome-music Aug 22nd - Aug 28th, 2016
item.description:
Audio Editing

  • Ardour - a cross-platform digital audio workstation emphasizing audio recording.
  • LMMS - another cross-platform digital audio workstation, more oriented towards making beats.

    • Music Programming

  • Pure Data - a visual programming language for audio and other multimedia.

item.title: ciconia/awesome-music Jun 27th - Jul 3rd, 2016
item.description:
Music Notation

  • Jan Angermüller's music fonts page - A listing and visual comparison of different music fonts.
  • Scorelib - a C++ library for parsing SCORE data files.

item.title: ciconia/awesome-music May 9th - May 15th, 2016
item.description:
Music Notation

  • MusicKitstars94 - Music sheet rendering for iOS and OSX.

    • Audio Libraries

  • mxmlstars19 - MusicXML parsing and layout library.

item.title: ciconia/awesome-music Mar 21st - Mar 27th, 2016
item.description:
Music Programming

  • music21 - A Toolkit for Computational Musicology.

    • Related lists

  • Awesome Music Productionstars359 - A curated list of software and resources to create music.

item.title: ciconia/awesome-music Mar 7th - Mar 13th, 2016
item.description:
Music Notation

  • Lilypond cook book - tips & tricks for getting the most out of lilypond.
  • NOTATIO - a forum devoted to the practice of music notation.

    • Music Programming

  • Bach: Automated Composer's Helper - a cross-platform set of patches and externals for Max, aimed to bring the richness of computer-aided composition into the real-time world.

item.title: ciconia/awesome-music Feb 29th - Mar 6th, 2016
item.description:
Music Programming

  • Sonic Pi - a live coding synth with an emphasis on educational use.

item.title: ciconia/awesome-music Feb 15th - Feb 21st, 2016
item.description:
MIDI Tools & Libraries

  • Midifile - C++ library for parsing Standard MIDI Files.

    • Music Programming

  • Tidal - a language built on Haskell for live coding patterns.

item.title: ciconia/awesome-music Feb 1st - Feb 7th, 2016
item.description:
Music Notation

  • Lilypond - free, open-source music engraving program, devoted to producing the highest-quality sheet music possible.
  • Lilypond Snippet Repository - an online database of Lilypond snippets ideas, features and hacks.
  • Denemo - a free music notation editor based on Lilypond.
  • Frescobaldistars479 - a free Lilypond sheet music editor.
  • Guido - a generic, portable library and API for the graphical rendering of musical scores.
  • Inknotestars144 - free, open source, browser based music notation and composition software.
  • LibMEIstars48 - a C++ library for reading and writing MEI files.
  • Lydownstars21 - a modern language for music notation, based on Lilypond.
  • MuseScorestars5.9k - free open-source music notation and composition software.
  • Python-ly - a tool and library for manipulating LilyPond files.
  • Veroviostars394 - a library and a toolkit for engraving MEI music notation into SVG.
  • Vexflowstars3k - a JavaScript library for rendering music notation and guitar tablature.

    • Audio Editing

  • Audacitystars4.9k - a free, cross-platform digital audio editor.

    • Audio Libraries

  • howler.jsstars18.4k - a Javascript audio library for the modern web.
  • JSyn - an audio synthesis software API for Java.
  • midi.jsstars3.3k - a framework for creating web-based MIDI apps.
  • PortAudio - a free, cross-platform, open-source, audio I/O library.
  • RustAudio - an aggregate of free and useful Audio, DSP and music libraries written in Rust.

    • Audio Tools

  • Koelstars12.5k - an open-source personal audio streaming server.
  • Lame - a high quality, free and open-source MP3 encoder.
  • Musikernelstars86 - a futuristic audio production platform (hardware support, APIs, hosts, plugins and more)
  • SoX - a free open-source command line utility for playing, converting and manipulating audio files.

    • Free Music Scores

  • cellist/Lilypond-Sheet-Musicstars91 - a collection of music typeset with lilypond (mostly chamber music and music for cello).
  • ciconia/musicstars16 - a collection of mostly baroque music, lots of sacred works by J. S. Bach, coded in lilypond/ripple.
  • CPDL - the choral public domain library contains more than 20K free scores of vocal music.
  • Éditions Nicolas Sceauxstars33 - baroque music scores (mainly French music), typeset using lilypond.
  • IMSLP - the International Music Score Library Project is the largest collection of public domain scores and parts on the web.
  • Mutopiastars184 - sheet music based on editions in the public domain.
  • wbsoft/lilymusicstars38 - beautiful LilyPond scores under free licenses.

    • MIDI Tools & Libraries

  • Timidity - an open-source command line synthesizer that plays MIDI files.

    • Music Programming

  • Aldastars3.8k - a music programming language for musicians.
  • Chuckstars476 - strongly-timed, concurrent, and on-the-fly music programming language.
  • CoffeeColliderstars207 - a language for real time audio synthesis and algorithmic composition in HTML5. "Write CoffeeScript, and be processed as SuperCollider."
  • Common Music - an open source music composition system.
  • Csound - a user-programmable and user-extensible sound processing language and software synthesizer.
  • IanniXstars240 - a graphical open-source sequencer, based on Iannis Xenakis works, for digital art.
  • Leipzigstars423 - a composition library for Overtone.
  • Music Suite - a language for generalized music notation and theory, based on Haskell.
  • Nyquist - a sound synthesis and composition language.
  • Overtonestars5.2k - an Open Source toolkit for designing synthesizers and collaborating with music.
  • Platonic Music Engine - an open-source music generation framework written in Lua.
  • SuperCollider - a programming language for real time audio synthesis and algorithmic composition.

    • Standards

  • MEI (Music Encoding Initiative) - an open-source effort to define a system for encoding musical documents in a machine-readable structure.
  • MusicXML - the standard open format for exchanging digital sheet music.
  • SMuFL (Standard Music Font Layout) - a specification for mapping music symbols to Unicode for use in music fonts.

item.title: ciconia/awesome-music Jan 18th - Jan 24th, 2016
item.description:
Music Notation

  • Tuneflstars22 - LilyPond mini-score engraving and sharing service for musicians.

item.title: ciconia/awesome-music Jan 4th - Jan 10th, 2016
item.description:
Music Notation

  • Lilyvmstars3 - Lilypond version manager.

item.title: ciconia/awesome-music Dec 28th - Jan 3rd, 2015
item.description:
Music Notation

  • OpenLilyLibstars99 - LilyPond tools - snippets, templates, and extensions.

item.title: ciconia/awesome-music Nov 30th - Dec 6th, 2015
item.description:
Audio Libraries

  • audio.jsstars2k - audio.js is a drop-in javascript library that allows HTML5's <audio> tag to be used anywhere.

    • Music Notation

  • Ripplestars21 - DRY for Lilypond - generate scores and parts with minimal fuss.
